parameters.query: SELECT entity_level, entity_id, date, spend, impressions, reach, clicks, conversions, frequency, ctr, cpa FROM meta_insights_daily WHERE date >= NOW() - INTERVAL '7 days' ORDER BY date DESC, spend DESC LIMIT 100;

parameters.jsonBody:
={"contents":[{"role":"user","parts":[{"text":"You are the Strategy Agent for Laiqa, a women's hormonal health brand.
Analyse the KPI snapshot and retrieved context. Cite specific entity IDs. Focus on TOFU/MOFU/BOFU funnel diagnosis. Never assert personal attributes.

KPI SNAPSHOT:
" + JSON.stringify($node['Aggregate KPIs'].item.json) + "

RAG CONTEXT:
" + JSON.stringify($node['Retrieve Fatigue Context'].item.json.results || [])}]}],"generationConfig":{"responseMimeType":"application/json"}}

={"contents":[{"role":"user","parts":[{"text":"You are the Optimisation Agent for Laiqa Meta Ads.
HARD CONSTRAINTS: Budget changes max 20%. Scale requires 10 conversions min. TARGET_CPA=500 TARGET_ROAS=2.5. Fatigue: frequency > 3.0 AND CTR declining.

KPI SNAPSHOT:
" + JSON.stringify($node['Aggregate KPIs'].item.json) + "

Return ONLY valid JSON with actions array. Each action must have: entity_level, entity_id, entity_name, action_type (pause/scale_budget/refresh_creative/reallocate), rationale, risk (low/medium/high), conversions_7d, spend_7d."}]}],"generationConfig":{"responseMimeType":"application/json"}}

={"contents":[{"role":"user","parts":[{"text":"You are the Copywriting Agent for Laiqa. Generate 3 compliant Meta ad copy variants.
BRAND VOICE: Warm, empowering, Ayurveda + modern science. Never medical advice.
FORBIDDEN: No PCOS questions, no fear framing, no implied diagnosis, no body shame.
Focus on: 'Support your hormonal balance', 'Discover your Prakriti', 'Wellness for every phase'.

STRATEGIC HYPOTHESES:
" + JSON.stringify($json.strategyData?.hypotheses || []) + "

Return ONLY valid JSON with variants array. Each variant: hook, body, cta, funnel_stage."}]}],"generationConfig":{"responseMimeType":"application/json"}}

={"contents":[{"role":"user","parts":[{"text":"You are the Compliance Agent for Laiqa on Meta.
HARD-FAIL: personal attribute assertions, fear-based framing, unsubstantiated medical claims, second-person diagnosis.
PASS: benefit-led language, wellness framing, inclusive tone.
For each FAIL provide a suggested rewrite.

PROPOSED COPY:
" + JSON.stringify($('Copywriting Agent').item.json?.candidates?.[0]?.content?.parts?.[0]?.text || '') + "

Return ONLY valid JSON: { overall_status: PASS|FAIL|NEEDS_REVISION, verdicts: [{status, violations, suggested_rewrite}] }"}]}],"generationConfig":{"responseMimeType":"application/json"}}

parameters.query: ={{`INSERT INTO agent_runs (run_id, agent_name, task_type, outputs_json, schema_valid, status, token_estimate, completed_at) VALUES (gen_random_uuid()::text, 'DAILY_AUDIT_BUNDLE', 'DAILY_AUDIT', '${JSON.stringify($json.report).replace(/'/g,"''")}'::jsonb, true, 'COMPLETED', ${$json.token_estimate}, NOW())`}}
